text:
Now I have the exact types. Key findings:
1. `useRelayChains` returns `chains` typed as `(RelayChain & Required<Pick<RelayChain, "viemChain">>)[]` — not our local `RelayChain` type
2. `useTokenPrice` signature is `(baseApiUrl?, options?, queryOptions?)` — first arg is `baseApiUrl` string, not options object
3. `useExecutionStatus` signature is `(client?, options?, onRequest?, onResponse?, queryOptions?)` — 5 params, not 3
4. `useQuote` returns `data` with all fields optional (`details?`, `fees?`)
5. `executionStatus` type is `"refund"` not `"refunded"`

Let me fix all these:
